news.paragraph: Chevron recently saw a price target increase following better-than-expected Q1 results, alongside CEO commentary regarding the start of physical oil shortages. Options traders should also consider the upcoming Proposal 6 vote, which places human rights and company valuation under scrutiny.
headlines: Chevron (CVX) Price Target Raised by $12 Following Better-than-Expected Q1
